Petition To Close An Insolvent Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike, via Zoom, for Richard Bolingbroke, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that the Estate is insolvent and that he plans to file a petition to close the Estate for lack of assets accordingly.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Sep-14-2022 at am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Order To Produce Contents Of Google Account Of Decedent
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Endy Ukoha-Ajike, Esq. for Richard Bolingbroke, Executor;
No other appearances on this matter.

The Court states that it has reviewed the petition and counsel's draft order. The Court notes that the draft order is based off of what Google sent to counsel and states that it intends to strike paragraphs 4 and 5 in the proposed order. The two paragraphs will be stricken because the Court cannot change the orders of another judge and that it will not say that Google has no obligation to disclose records. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike states that they have this impossible situation with Google, and that they just want Google to release the contents of the YouTube channel of Jok Church.

At the conclusion of counsel's comments, the Petition for Order to Produce Contents of Google Account of Decedent is taken under submission by the Court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Chan. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated May 18, 2006 is admitted to probate. Richard Bolingbroke is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Status on close of estate is set for hearing on August 17, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
